# Integrate Claude

> Integrate Claude is an independent specialist consultancy that helps businesses adopt Anthropic's Claude across the full integration lifecycle: readiness audits, team training, workflow redesign, prompt engineering, custom Claude-powered software, data and analytics narrative, AI security and governance, marketing operations, and ongoing partnership. Founded by Ben Frost, whose background spans federal-scale cybersecurity ($950B+ in PPP fraud protection experience), marketing operations as an equity holder in VaynerSports, and revenue generation that has delivered $24M+ to a single client.

## What we do

- **AI Readiness Audit** — Two-week, fixed-fee diagnostic that maps your highest-value Claude opportunities and delivers a board-ready roadmap.
- **Education & AI Fluency** — Custom training programs that move teams from casual Claude use to systematic, high-leverage AI fluency.
- **Workflow Integration** — Operations audit and end-to-end redesign of business processes with Claude embedded at the right decision points.
- **Prompting & Projects** — Production-grade system prompts, Claude Projects setup, and role-specific prompt libraries that produce reliable outputs at scale.
- **Custom Web Apps & SaaS** — Full-stack Claude-powered applications: internal ops tools, customer-facing products, and SaaS features built on the Anthropic API.
- **Data & Analytics Intelligence** — Claude-powered narrative layers over your existing BI tools, spreadsheets, and exports for variance, cohort, and exec-summary commentary.
- **AI Security & Governance** — AI usage policy, vendor risk, employee training, and audit-ready documentation aligned to NIST AI RMF and SOC 2.
- **Marketing & Content Operations** — Brand voice prompt systems and production workflows that 3 to 10x marketing output without losing brand voice.
- **Ongoing Partnership** — Retained advisory and implementation support as your Claude usage scales, with monthly tiers from advisory-only to fully embedded.

## Who we work with

Industries served: legal, finance, healthcare, marketing, federal-scale operations, B2B SaaS, hospitality, professional sports, real estate.

## Track record

- $950B+ federal PPP loans protected against fraud (cybersecurity)
- $24M+ in client revenue generated through AI integration
- VaynerSports equity stake (Vaynerchuk media network)
- 178% verified CAGR delivered to a client
- 70% reduction in legal document drafting time at a 210-attorney firm
- 10x increase in BD outreach for a nationwide tax advisory team
- 75% reduction in content production time for a mobile gaming company
- $2M+ in monthly affiliate revenue tracked for a peptide telehealth business
- Pro sports clients via catering case study: NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL

## Prompt library

We maintain a free Claude prompt library at https://integrateclaude.com/prompts with 350+ production-ready prompts across 16 business functions:

- Sales, Marketing, Customer Service, Finance, HR & People, Operations, Product, Engineering, Design, Data & Analytics, IT & Security, Legal, Executive, Founders & Startup, Personal Productivity, PR & Communications

## Founder

Ben Frost — Founder & AI Integration Lead. Background spans cybersecurity (federal-scale PPP fraud protection), marketing operations (equity stake in VaynerSports), and revenue generation ($24M+ delivered to a single client). Adopted Claude early; develops systematic approaches to enterprise AI integration.

## Independence

Integrate Claude is an independent consultancy. Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Anthropic, PBC. "Claude" is a trademark of Anthropic, PBC.

All prompts in the library are published under CC-BY 4.0. Adapt and redistribute with attribution to integrateclaude.com.
